title: [NRGD]NRG Core datapack
description: The core datapack of my "NRG" modpack. The main update of this modpack is right here.
body:
# This is the core datapack of my [NRG modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nrg). 
All bug fixes and new feature additions will be posted here.

## If you play my Modpack:

- You need to **manually replace the datapack in your modpack** to update your modpack.
   
- The **first three digits** of the version number of datapack are the **version number of your modpack**；
 
- And the **last digit** is the **version number of datapack** itself.

- Modpack players **do not need to replace** the datapack with version 1.

_For example, datapack v1.1.2.1 is compatible with modpack v1.1.2, but players do not need to replace it._

## If you want to make your own "random gunfight" game:

You can also **modify my datapack and apply it to your own game.**

## **MODIFICATION TUTORIAL**

The modification **tutorial is HERE.**

[中文版](https://nimshade.lanzoul.com/i8bI932w045c)

[English version](https://nimshade.lanzoul.com/iAH5d33086wd)
## Main functions：
**Start or end a "random gun fight" with one command.**

**The competition is divided into two modes: team competition and individual competition. The player or team that eliminates the most players within the limited time wins.**

## The competition process is as follows: (taking my [NRG modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nrg) as an example) 

1. The game will automatically divide all players into two teams (only in team mode).

2. Automatically notify players of the competition information, such as the competition location and mode. The player's goal is to eliminate as many opponents as possible within 15 minutes.

3. Randomly teleport players to the competition venue. In the team mode, the spawn points are fixed, while in the single-player mode, there are 8 random spawn points.

4. All players who are reborn will receive a 3-second invincibility effect, 80 health points, and random weapons and accessories.

5. During the competition, players will receive additional items of their choice every two minutes. The vehicle will refresh every four minutes.

6. After the competition, the contestants will be automatically ranked and the competition results will be announced. Initialize all the maps and wait for the next game.

## 游戏玩法（以[NRG整合包](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nrg)举例）：

1. 自动将所有玩家分成两队（仅在团队模式下）。

2. 自动通知玩家比赛的信息，如比赛地点和模式。玩家的目标是在15分钟内尽可能淘汰更多的对手。

3. 随机传送玩家到比赛场地。团队模式中的刷出点是固定的，而在单人模式中，有8个随机刷出点。

4. 所有玩家重生后将获得3秒无敌效果，80点血量，并将获得随机武器和附件。

5. 在比赛过程中，每2分钟玩家将获得自己选择的额外物品。载具将每4分钟刷新一次。

6. 比赛结束后，将自动排名，并公布比赛结果。初始化所有地图，等待下一个比赛。

## The do's and don'ts
1. This datapack currently supports **up to 8 players** to play. If there are more than 8 people, its "Single-player mode" will go wrong. You can modify it by yourself according to the tutorial to make it support more people to play.
   
2. Currently, this datapack only supports **manual startup and early termination** of the game. If you want it to run automatically, you can wait for me to release an automatic version or write a simple datapack yourself to achieve this.

3. If you want to use this datapack in your own game, **you must modify it according to the tutorial. Otherwise, it won't work.**
   
4. This datapack **contains no anti-cheating measures.** It is not recommended that you use it to run public servers directly. ~~Because there are too many cheat mods about TACZ now~~

5. If you have any questions or ideas, **please [report them to me](https://center.mcmod.cn/1144540/)**
